title: Job Opening Teacher at Pearson India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Pearson India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!
